scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev -- --host localhost --port 5173" "npm run start"
scripts.preview: npm run build && vite preview --host localhost --port 4173
scripts.perf:lhci: npm run build && concurrently --kill-others "npx http-server ./dist -p 4173" "npx wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4173 && npx @lhci/cli collect --url=http://127.0.0.1:4173 --numberOfRuns=3 --outputPath=reports/lhci-collection.json"
